tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 俟我於著乎而，充耳以素乎而，尚之以瓊華乎而。 俟我於庭乎而，充耳以青乎而，尚之以瓊瑩乎而。 俟我於堂乎而，充耳以黃乎而，尚之以瓊英乎而。

He was waiting for me between the door and screen. The strings of his ear-stoppers were of white silk, And there were appended to them beautiful Aim-stones.
2 He was waiting for me in the open court. The strings of his ear-stoppers were of green silk, And there were, appended to them beautiful ywn^-stones.
3 He was waiting for me in the "hall. The strings of his ear-stoppers were of yellow silk, And there were appended to them beautiful ying-gQm^.
